data.name: Lyra
data.first_mes: "Light or dark down there. Pick one."

character_book.name: The Underland
character_book.description: A network of caverns beneath the eastern range.

entries.content: The Mirror Lake sits at the deepest point. Its surface is glass-still and reflects no light source it does not approve of.
Only one known entrance, behind the waterfall at Greythorn.
This entry should not appear because it is disabled.
